claims.summary: A hard-coded shared collaboration path makes Witness silently degrade when the runtime root moves.
claims.disposition: verify ASTRID_SHARED_COLLAB_DIR, default parity, and missing/malformed path resilience

claims.summary: Lingering can carry high tension and fraying at the same time.
claims.disposition: verify exact density 0.71, pressure 0.55, dispersal 0.30 combined-language regression

claims.summary: Response canonicalization must preserve a Unicode RESIDUE suffix and never create invalid UTF-8.
claims.disposition: verify four-byte boundary truncation and multiline Unicode residue regressions

claims.summary: Byte-safe truncation does not by itself prove that every extended grapheme cluster remains visually whole.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline combining-mark and joined-emoji truncation fixture review with no runtime behavior change
